records.ety: [AS. geclipod, p. p. of clipian, cleopian, cliopian, to call. See Clepe, and also the Note under Y-.]

defs: Called; named; -- obsolete, except in archaic or humorous writings.
quotes: It is full fair to ben yclept madame.
But come, thou goddess fair and free. In heaven ycleped Euphrosyne.
Those charming little missives ycleped valentines.
